title: PAU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Technical Assistant Posts
description: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy of 01 Technical Assistant Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering can apply for the PAU Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age ...
